info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家Lv.2\",\"title_id\":\"author_level_2\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家Lv.2\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7280333278039510052","book_info":{"abstract":"“看山是山，看水是水；看山不是山，看水不是水；看山还是山，看水还是水。”金成大学毕业进入工程处工作，勤勤恳恳、兢兢业业，从毛头小伙子到年近“不惑”中年大叔，回望走过的路，有得有失、风雨彩虹，“人生在于折腾”；在工程处五年、工程局三年、设计院七年，触摸所谓体制内规则与真相，顿感职场十五年犹如一梦，醒悟自带光环的央国企并非职场“宇宙尽头”，百感交集、思绪万千……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ofd5ce79d91794e76827c113fccddcc20~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"万山百味","author_id":"","book_id":"7280333278039510052","book_name":"职场惊梦：央国企老科长降薪裁员","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#283848","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":261,\"name\":\"都市日常\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261\u0026name=都市日常\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都市\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1\u0026name=都市\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":127,\"name\":\"职场\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=127\u0026name=职场\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7280344718070776359","read_count":"539","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1076689"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"981","tags":"都市日常,都市,职场","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c06f6756c07c6b4b0054ee4b0ffdb7cd~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779509514\u0026x-signature=iuuOz3ff6
